testcase.name: handleIncomingCall_createsLiveCall_whenUserFound
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Richard Mateo Obando\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: handleIncomingCall_returnsHangup_whenUserNotFound
testcase.system-out: 01:23:04.452 [main] INFO com.voicepay.ivr.service.IvrService -- Incoming call from: +34611223344 01:23:04.454 [main] ERROR com.voicepay.ivr.service.IvrService -- User not found or error calling User Service: User not found

testcase.name: confirmPayment_returnsSuccess_whenPaymentWorks
testcase.system-out: 01:23:04.459 [main] INFO com.voicepay.ivr.service.IvrService -- Incoming call from: +34611223344 01:23:04.460 [main] INFO com.voicepay.ivr.service.IvrService -- Confirming payment for user: 2

testcase.name: confirmPayment_setsProcessingStatus
testcase.system-out: 01:23:04.473 [main] INFO com.voicepay.ivr.service.IvrService -- Incoming call from: +34611223344 01:23:04.474 [main] INFO com.voicepay.ivr.service.IvrService -- Confirming payment for user: 2

testcase.name: confirmPayment_returnsError_whenPaymentServiceFails
testcase.system-out: 01:23:04.481 [main] INFO com.voicepay.ivr.service.IvrService -- Incoming call from: +34611223344 01:23:04.482 [main] INFO com.voicepay.ivr.service.IvrService -- Confirming payment for user: 2 01:23:04.483 [main] ERROR com.voicepay.ivr.service.IvrService -- Error processing payment: Payment service down
